requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Local Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与当地安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與當地安裝審查

summary.en: Iceland projects often require local municipal building review, fire authority review, and operator inspection for storage sites in addition to technical safety evidence. In practice, the process is project-specific and focuses on thermal runaway prevention, hazardous-gas ventilation, spacing and containment strategies, fire-fighting resource planning, emergency stop logic, and commissioning records, rather than a single national blanket BESS fire product certificate.
summary.zh: 冰岛项目常见需要当地市政建筑审查、消防主管机关审查和运营方验收，除技术安全证据外还需项目专项审查。实践中主要依据热失控防护、可燃气体排风、间距和隔离策略、消防资源规划、紧急停机逻辑及调试记录，而非单一全国统一的 BESS 消防整机证书。
summary.zht: 冰島項目常見需當地市政建築審查、消防主管機關審查和營運方驗收，除技術安全證據外還需項目專項審查。實務上主要依據熱失控防護、可燃氣體排風、間距和隔離策略、消防資源規劃、緊急停機邏輯及調試紀錄，而非單一全國統一的 BESS 消防整機證書。

standards_or_laws: Icelandic municipal building and fire-safety permit framework
Icelandic Civil Protection and local fire authority review practice
Project-specific insurer and operator fire-risk requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 for stationary storage fire-design review support. These are useful comparison references but do not replace Icelandic local review obligations for site approval and local operator acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用 GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023 和 GB/T 36558 支持固定式储能消防设计审查。它们可作为比较参考，但不能替代冰岛现场批准和运营方验收中的当地审查义务。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用 GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023 和 GB/T 36558 支持固定式儲能消防設計審查。它們可作為比較參考，但不能取代冰島現場批准和營運方驗收中的當地審查義務。

gap.en: Prepare a site-specific Iceland fire dossier: hazard and consequence classification, thermal management and gas venting evidence, emergency response procedures in Icelandic, spacing and access strategy, inspection route, acceptance criteria, and coordination with municipal and operator reviewers before energisation.
gap.zh: 需准备冰岛项目特定的消防资料包，包括风险后果分级、热管理与排气证据、冰岛语应急处置流程、间距与通道方案、验收检查路线、验收标准，并在送电前与市政和运营方审查方进行协调。
gap.zht: 需準備冰島項目特定的消防資料包，包括風險後果分級、熱管理與排氣證據、冰島語應急處置流程、間距與通道方案、驗收檢查路線、驗收標準，並在送電前與市政和營運方審查方進行協調。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local municipal permitting, fire authority review, project insurer review, or operator acceptance applies; no confirmed single national Iceland-wide unit fire certificate replacing these route checks
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T documents are project-supporting evidence and do not replace Iceland fire and municipal route reviews

source.publisher: Icelandic Civil Protection and local municipal fire-review practice

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product test evidence should be treated as base material only. Iceland-facing BESS projects need local fire-dossier completion and acceptance before project energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品测试证据应仅视为底层材料。面向冰岛的 BESS 项目在投运前必须完成当地消防资料包并通过验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品測試證據應僅視為基礎材料。面向冰島的 BESS 項目在投運前必須完成當地消防資料包並通過驗收。
